  "findings": [
    "Ladder-type joint reinforcement spacing exceeds the maximum vertical spacing limits specified by TMS 402/602."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Expose affected joint areas to verify actual spacing.",
    "Remedy the spacing deficiency by installing additional reinforcement or reconstructing the non-compliant wall sections prior to grouting or final closeout."
  ],
  "rationale": "TMS 402/602 prescribes strict maximum vertical spacing limits for joint reinforcement (typically 16 inches or 24 inches depending on the specific wall type, seismic design category, and structural requirements). Exceeding this spacing compromises the structural integrity and lateral load resistance of the masonry wall, resulting in a non-compliant installation.",

    "TMS 402/602",
    "TMS 402 Section 6.2",
    "TMS 602 Specification"
  ]
}
